name: N7UniformSecp256k1X
why_it_matters: The uniform multiplication-by-n x-coordinate formula x(n*P)=Phi_n(x)/PsiSq_n(x) on the actual secp256k1 point group, for all n at once - the monolithic missing rung (node S3/N7, BARRIERS.md B3). Substrate landed: S1 coordinate-ring translation, S2 psi_n|psi_2n, and the full S3a base for n=2 (x/y/Point) and n=3 (x/y). The remaining wall is the general induction (absent from Mathlib: no omega division polynomial, no uniform Point<->Psi/Phi map).

default_budget.note: Not a tier-0 target. Multi-cycle focused grind per the proof DAG; the fast-feedback server bridge speeds verification, not authoring.

hint: Proof DAG (attack order). S3a LANDED for n=2,3 (coordinate + Point level): y(2P)=(x^6+140x^3-392)/(2y)^3 (MultiplicationYFormula), Point-level 2*P=(Phi2/Psi2Sq, omega2/(2y)^3) (DoublingPointFormula), and y(3P)=omega3/(3x^4+84x)^3 with omega3=y*(x^12+1540x^9-87024x^6-109760x^3-1229312) (MultiplicationYTripleFormula). Computed y-coordinate division-polynomial numerators so far: omega2 = x^6+140x^3-392 (even n, no y factor); omega3 = y*(x^12+1540x^9-87024x^6-109760x^3-1229312) (odd n, y factor). NEXT (depth, not more fixed-n): (S2') define the general secp256k1 omega_n bivariately via the standard recurrence omega_n = (psi(n+2)*psi(n-1)^2 - psi(n-2)*psi(n+1)^2)/(4y) using Mathlib's W.psi (4y a unit in F_p), and prove it reproduces the landed omega2, omega3 (evalEval anchors) -- grounding the general object in two independent kernel-verified derivations. Then (S3a-uniform) y(nP)=omega_n/psi_n^3 on Points, and (S3b) the x-induction x((n+1)P)=addX(x(nP),x,slope(...)) with x(nP)=Phi_n/PsiSq_n and the omega-based y(nP) substituted, via prePsi_even/odd, PsiSq_even/odd, Phi_ofNat + the S1 coordinate-ring translation. The FiveTorsionBridge already carries the s2/s3 -> Point-level 3*P=some(X3,Y3) connection (hsl3s == the y-triple hl3 hypothesis), so per-n Point-level assembly is mechanical; the remaining WALL is the uniform induction over all n. Denominator nonzero: n*P affine => psi_n(P)!=0 => PsiSq_n(x)=psi_n(P)^2!=0 (eval bridge eval_PsiSq_eq_normEDS_sq + torsion bridge).

source.from: manual (S1/S2 substrate landed, PR #200/#201; wall mapped BARRIERS.md B3)
